_comment: General world-news feeds for ai_manager's 4x/day recap (src/triggers/ai_manager.py's _world_news_snapshot) -- unlike config/keywords.json's finance/crypto/AI feeds, these are pulled unconditionally (news_rss.fetch_latest_articles, no keyword gate), since 'what's the latest important news' doesn't fit a keyword whitelist the way a finance alert does. 'lang' tells the prompt which items are non-English so Claude translates them inline while synthesizing the recap, rather than a separate translation call. Feed URLs occasionally change or get retired -- a broken feed is logged and skipped, never a hard failure for the whole run (see news_rss.py); check the live run logs after any feed list change to confirm each one is still resolving.
